title: Kawaikute Gomen Music Disc
description: This resourcepack replaces the wait music disc with Kawaikute Gomen Music Disc (the outro of Roshindere/Alya sometimes hides her feelings in russian)
body:
🎀 Kawaikute Gomen Music Disc Datapack — *Alya Outro Edition*  
Craft idol charm with a Russian twist—no dungeon loot required!  
This datapack replaces the **Wait** music disc with **Kawaikute Gomen**, using the *Alya Sometimes Hides Her Feelings in Russian* anime outro version for a softer, emotionally resonant vibe.

✨ Features  
✅ Replaces wait with *Kawaikute Gomen* (Roshindere outro version)   
🧩 Modular JSON structure for easy editing and anime swaps  
🛠️ Compatible with Minecraft 1.16+  
🎧 Works with vanilla jukeboxes and redstone music setups
